importlib.machinery/WindowsRegistryFinde.name: WindowsRegistryFinder
importlib.machinery/WindowsRegistryFinde.description: Finder for modules declared in the Windows registry. This class implements the importlib.abc.MetaPathFinder ABC. Only class methods are defined by this class to alleviate the need for instantiation. Added in version 3.3. Deprecated since version 3.6: Use site configuration instead. Future versions of Python may not enable this finder by default.
